title: Data Sources
createDescription: Configure a new platform connector to ingest data.
editDescription: Update the data source settings and credentials.
noDataSourcesYetDescription: Add your first platform connector to start ingesting data.
noDataSourcesFoundDescription: No data sources match "{query}". Try a different search term.
leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep current value
nameExists: A data source with this name already exists
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{name}" data source? All ingested data and media feeds from this source will also be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

fileUpload.createDescription: Upload PDF or Excel files to ingest data.
fileUpload.description: Select PDF (.pdf) or Excel (.xlsx, .xls) files to upload.
fileUpload.noFilesError: Please select at least one file to upload.
fileUpload.maxFilesError: You can upload a maximum of {max} files.
fileUpload.invalidTypeError: "{name}" is not a supported file type. Only PDF and Excel files are accepted.
fileUpload.fileTooLargeError: "{name}" exceeds the maximum file size of {max}.

placeholders.hashtagsTopics: Type a hashtag or topic and press Enter
